title: Downtime Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost of unplanned downtime based on lost production, labor, energy, quality, and recovery expenses, following industrial engineering standards (ISO 22400, Lean, Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Planned Production Rate
inputs.businessContext: The standard output rate per hour under normal operating conditions (ISO 22400).

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard output rate per hour under normal operating conditions (ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal çalışma koşullarında saat başına standart çıktı oranı (ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.de: Reduktionsfaktor für Bögen, Hindernisse und Installationsunvollkommenheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de sortie standard par heure dans des conditions de fonctionnement normales (ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de producción estándar por hora en condiciones normales de operación (ISO 22400).

inputs.label: Downtime Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the unplanned downtime event.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total duration of the unplanned downtime event.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Standard-Ausbringungsrate pro Stunde unter normalen Betriebsbedingungen (ISO 22400).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale de l'événement d'arrêt non planifié.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total del evento de parada no planificada.

inputs.label: Revenue per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Selling price or standard cost per unit of output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Selling price or standard cost per unit of output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim çıktı başına satış fiyatı veya standart maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de vente ou coût standard par unité de production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de venta o costo estándar por unidad de producción.

inputs.label: Direct Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including benefits for operators affected by downtime.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de main-d'œuvre directe par heure
label_i18n.es: Costo de mano de obra directa por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage including benefits for operators affected by downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duruştan etkilenen operatörler için yan haklar dahil ortalama saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Stundenlohn inkl. Zuschläge für von Ausfallzeiten betroffene Bediener.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire moyen incluant les avantages pour les opérateurs affectés par l'arrêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario promedio por hora, incluyendo prestaciones, de los operadores afectados por la parada.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of electricity, gas, or other energy consumed during production.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of electricity, gas, or other energy consumed during production.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim sırasında tüketilen elektrik, gaz veya diğer enerjinin ortalama maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten für Strom, Gas oder andere während der Produktion verbrauchte Energie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen de l'électricité, du gaz ou autre énergie consommée pendant la production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio de electricidad, gas u otra energía consumida durante la producción.

inputs.label: Scrap Rate During Downtime
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted due to restart or instability after downtime (Six Sigma defect rate).

label_i18n.es: Tasa de desperdicio durante la parada

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of material wasted due to restart or instability after downtime (Six Sigma defect rate).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duruş sonrası yeniden başlatma veya istikrarsızlık nedeniyle israf edilen malzeme yüzdesi (Altı Sigma kusur oranı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Materialausschusses durch Neustart oder Instabilität nach Ausfallzeit (Six Sigma Fehlerrate).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matériaux gaspillés en raison du redémarrage ou de l'instabilité après l'arrêt (taux de défaut Six Sigma).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de material desperdiciado debido al reinicio o inestabilidad después de la parada (tasa de defectos Seis Sigma).

inputs.label: Recovery Time Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for additional time needed to return to steady-state production (Lean Takt time recovery).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for additional time needed to return to steady-state production (Lean Takt time recovery).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit üretime dönmek için gereken ek süre çarpanı (Yalın Takt süresi toparlanması).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für zusätzliche Zeit zur Rückkehr in den stationären Produktionszustand (Lean Taktzeit-Erholung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour le temps supplémentaire nécessaire pour revenir à une production en régime permanent (récupération du temps de takt Lean).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para el tiempo adicional necesario para volver a la producción en estado estable (recuperación del tiempo de takt Lean).

inputs.label: Shift Type
inputs.businessContext: Shift during which downtime occurred; affects labor cost multipliers (night/weekend premiums).

businessContext_i18n.en: Shift during which downtime occurred; affects labor cost multipliers (night/weekend premiums).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duruşun meydana geldiği vardiya; işçilik maliyeti çarpanlarını etkiler (gece/hafta sonu primleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Schicht, in der die Ausfallzeit auftrat; beeinflusst Arbeitskostenzuschläge (Nacht-/Wochenendzuschläge).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quart au cours duquel l'arrêt s'est produit ; affecte les multiplicateurs de coût de main-d'œuvre (primes de nuit/week-end).
businessContext_i18n.es: Turno durante el cual ocurrió el tiempo de inactividad; afecta los multiplicadores de costos laborales (primas nocturnas/fines de semana).

rules.message: Production rate and revenue per unit must be greater than zero.
Scrap rate must be between 0 and 100%.

thresholds.message: Downtime exceeds 4 hours – immediate escalation recommended.
Total downtime cost exceeds $10,000 – review root cause.
Scrap rate above 10% – investigate restart procedure.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
